query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.full_name, u.role_id, r.name as roleName, r.code as roleCode, r.level
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
WHERE u.username = 'RADMAN';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT u.id, u.username, u.full_name, u.role_id, r.name as roleName, r.code as roleCode, r.level
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
WHERE u.username = 'RADMAN';
